ui_response.ui_state: Stuck in 'Thinking...' with 'Copilot is responding...' status bar indefinitely. No text output rendered. Same as Build #5.

console_state.warning_details: React Router leaf route warning only

diagnosis.pattern: Silent block - SSE stream opened with 200 OK but zero events delivered (identical to Build #5)
diagnosis.diagnostic_logs_note: Server-side diagnostic logs (APF_WARNING_TEST:vts_pre/vts_post) should be checked on Etap server to verify if write() was called and how many bytes were written.
diagnosis.comparison_with_build5: Identical behavior: 200 OK, 0 SSE events, infinite Thinking state. GOAWAY removal alone did not fix warning delivery.
diagnosis.user_experience: Service appears permanently loading/thinking. No error, no warning, no timeout.
diagnosis.goaway_fix_effect: No visible change from client side. Removing GOAWAY did not enable DATA frame delivery. The SSE stream is still empty.
action_needed: If write() bytes > 0 but client receives 0 events, the HTTP/2 framing layer is still dropping DATA frames
Consider sending a minimal SSE event (e.g., 'data: test\n\n') to verify if ANY data can traverse the proxy
May need to investigate HTTP/2 flow control, window size, or content-length issues
